vapi-call-handler.name: Equity Insurance - VAPI AI Receptionist (Main)
vapi-call-handler.note: Added sendFormSMS function route (output 6) with Email-to-SMS gateway logic for sending Google Form links via text.

notifications-escalation.name: Equity Insurance - Post-Call Notifications & Escalation
notifications-escalation.note: Legacy notification workflow - kept as backup

wf01-inbound-call-router.name: WF-01 Inbound Call Router
wf01-inbound-call-router.note: Updated with Briefing Session #1 corrections: email REQUIRED, shopping reason, current coverage, transfer triggers, service culture, claims detail, property grandfathering, business EIN/revenue, auto lienholder, renters address

wf02-new-customer-intake.name: WF-02 New Customer P&C Intake
wf02-new-customer-intake.note: Updated valid fields whitelist for Auto Insurance intake (auto_make_model_year, auto_accidents_violations_5yr, caller_profession, phone_confirmed, insurance_type) and Home Insurance fields (property_type, property_owner_or_renter, property_claims_losses_5yr).

wf03-hot-lead-transfer.name: WF-03 Hot Lead Transfer Handler
wf03-hot-lead-transfer.note: Sub-workflow triggered by WF-02 hot lead detection. Added secondary transfer fallback chain with guard for placeholder phone. SMTP replaced with Gmail.

wf05-claims-router.name: WF-05 Claims Router
wf05-claims-router.note: Added VAPI Transfer Command node for business-hours warm transfer to Val (+18087800473)

wf06-post-call-processor.name: WF-06 Post-Call Processor
wf06-post-call-processor.note: Migration flag VAPI_AI_COLLECTED. Fixed business_hours analytics default (was always true).

wf08-sms-form-sender.name: WF-08 SMS Form Sender (Email-to-SMS Gateway)
wf08-sms-form-sender.note: Full rewrite: Email-to-SMS gateway replaces direct email. Sends Google Form link as SMS to all major US carrier gateways (ATT, TMobile, Verizon, Sprint, USCellular, Cricket, MetroPCS, Boost, GoogleFi). Includes reminder tracking via static data.
